languages.original_text: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance get their hands on anything on those pedestals."

languages.text: "Говори за себя, хорошо? Мое чутье точно подсказывает мне, что за любой предмет на этих постаментах любой мало-мальски смыслящий в выгоде хладный торговец удавится".

languages.text: 「あなただけの話ですよ。私の直感では、利益を見据えたコールドトレーダーなら、あの棚にあるものを手に入れるチャンスを逃すまいと思いますよ」
languages.original_text: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance get their hands on anything on those pedestals."

traits.locale_text: 「あなただけの話ですよ。私の直感では、利益を見据えたコールドトレーダーなら、あの棚にあるものを手に入れるチャンスを逃すまいと思いますよ。」

languages.text: « Parlez pour vous. Je crois que n'importe quel adepte du Commerce Froid qui a du flair pour le profit sauterait sur l'occasion de mettre la main sur ce qui se trouve sur ces piédestaux. »
languages.original_text: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance to get their hands on anything on those pedestals."

traits.locale_text: « Parlez pour vous. Je crois que n'importe quel adepte du Commerce Froid qui a du flair pour le profit sauterait sur l'occasion de mettre la main sur ce qui se trouve sur ces piédestaux. »

languages.text: "Sprecht bitte für Euch selbst, ja? Mein Bauch sagt mir, dass jeder Kalthändler mit einem Sinn für Profit die Chance nutzen würde, sich das Zeug auf diesen Podesten unter den Nagel zu reißen."
languages.original_text: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance to get their hands on anything on those pedestals."

languages.text: "Kendi adına konuş, olur mu? İçimden bir ses, kâr kokusu alan tüm Soğuk Tacirlerin o kaidelerin üzerindeki herhangi bir şeye elini sürme şansına balıklama atlayacağını söylüyor."
languages.original_text: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance to get their hands on anything on those pedestals."

traits.locale_text: "Kendi adına konuş, olur mu? İçimden bir ses, kâr kokusu alan tüm Soğuk Tacirlerin o kaidelerin üzerindeki herhangi bir şeye elini sürme şansına balıklama atlayacağını söylüyor."

languages.text: «Habla por ti misma, ¿quieres? Mi instinto me dice que cualquier comerciante frío con olfato para los negocios se daría de tortas para echarle el guante a lo que hay encima de esos pedestales».
languages.original_text: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance to get their hands on anything on those pedestals."

traits.locale_text: «Habla por ti misma, ¿quieres? Mi instinto me dice que cualquier comerciante frío con olfato para los negocios se daría de tortas para echarle el guante a lo que hay encima de esos pedestales».

languages.text: “你说的是你自己吧？我的直觉告诉我，任何嗅觉敏锐的冷市商人，都会抓住机会去捞那些基座上的玩意儿。”
languages.original_text: "Speak for yourself, will you? My gut tells me that any Cold Trader with a nose for profit would jump at the chance to get their hands on anything on those pedestals."
